# Phase 9 Unknown Risk Plan

## Scope

Plan Phase 9.1.1 governance residual risk and unknowns doctrine as documentation-only governance infrastructure.

## Deliverables

- Governance uncertainty doctrine
- Residual-risk philosophy
- Unknown-threat governance
- Black-swan governance doctrine
- Incomplete-knowledge safeguards
- Constitutional humility doctrine
- Anti-certainty governance philosophy
- Unknown-runtime-vector skepticism
- Civilization uncertainty survivability
- Phase 9.1.1 unknowns risk summary

## Explicit Non-Goals

- runtime activation
- execution authorization
- provider execution
- deployment authorization
- orchestration activation
- infrastructure activation
- adapters
- fetch
- axios
- Prisma changes
- Supabase changes
- Twilio
- email execution
- credentials
- OAuth
- API keys
- background jobs
- autonomous communication
- autonomous governance
- execution-capable infrastructure

## Review Checklist

- Runtime activation does not exist.
- Provider execution does not exist.
- Orchestration activation does not exist.
- Deployment authority does not exist.
- Execution-capable infrastructure does not exist.
- Uncertainty analysis creates no runtime authority.
- Residual-risk framework does not bypass constitutional supremacy.
- Unknown-risk doctrine creates no hidden execution escalation.
- Uncertainty management creates no infrastructure activation authority.
- Skepticism does not weaken auditability.
